title: psidium coriaceum
intro: Psidium coriaceum, also known as the tough guava, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Psidium coriaceum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of Psidium coriaceum can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
